nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Amazonian black-throated trogon
nodes.summary: Amazonian black-throated trogon（Amazonian black-throated trogon，学名 Trogon rufus），主要分布于原始森林、次生林、森林。

nodes.name: 原始森林
nodes.summary: 原始森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联240种鸟类，包括黑額鳴冠雉、Singing quail、Stripe-faced wood quail等240种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林
nodes.summary: 森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联402种鸟类，包括疣鼻棲鴨、Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan等402种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: amazonicus along the Amazon. The Amazonian black-throated trogon generally inhabits the understory to mid-story in the interior of humid primary forest and mature secondary forest, where it favors areas near streams

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: amazonicus along the Amazon. The Amazonian black-throated trogon generally inhabits the understory to mid-story in the interior of humid primary forest and mature secondary forest, where it favors areas near streams

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In Colombia it occurs in terra firme forest, and in southwestern Brazil is sometimes associated with stands of Guadua bamboo
